review_text: I have been going to her for the past four maybe five years she has been absolutely amazing! I’m so happy with my results. It’s super important to have someone who has been in the game for many years and not only checks on you multiple times during your session BUT talks to you so you are BREATHING, because you can pass out. But someone who is very lively and friendly. Definitely recommend her! Great prices and great personality.
I had a tattoo removed here. The staff is professional and kind. The price was the most reasonable I found, and the quality of the service was top notch. I highly recommend to everyone!
Very good and convenient very good staff great work

Celia and her team are fantastic. I did extensive research and even had one session with another tattoo removal guy (NOT a good experience). Prices are very competitive and she's a delight to chat with. She's completely removed two of my tattoos (one black and the other highly colored) and I'm currently working on a couple other ones. Can't recommend her enough. Professional, compassionate and reasonably priced. They also give back extensively to the community.

This place is awesome! The front desk employee is very nice. Celia is very professional and goes above and beyond to make sure you’re comfortable and leave happy. I’ve been going to see her for tattoo removal off and on for 13 years. She does an absolute great job and makes me feel at ease by talking to me to distract me from the pain of the process. 10/10 recommend!

The best compliment I have to give about Celia is her price - $125 for a 10 square inch tattoo removal session, which is the least amount of money I've been charged so far in my journey of tattoo removal.  She's professional with taking photographs, keeping records etc however, the only complaint I'd give is that her questions can be a little intrusive, and the experience is a little like she's picking your brain trying to get in your head.  I guess some people don't mind that but some people would rather just stick to business and get their tattoo removed, minus the intrusive, personal questions.
Great service fair orices
Hi what’s the hours?

I have been wanting to get my microblading removed for a while, and after much research, decided to schedule a consult here. The receptionist and technician made me feel so welcome and at home here. The technician was very kind and gentle, explaining every step of the process. I was fortunate to have only needed 1 session and a touch up later on. I couldn’t believe how much of the ink was visibly gone just after the first session!! The only regret I have is that I wish I had come here much sooner! I had a follow up appointment about 2 months later, and she touched up a few shadowy spots, complimentary. I am so grateful for my treatment here! Don’t hesitate to contact them, especially if you are living with embarrassing eyebrows like I was!! Thank you! 🫶❤️

Just had my microblading removed here and I’m so impressed! 💖 They knew exactly what they were doing, explained everything so well, and made me feel completely at ease. The process was quick, the results are amazing, and the prices were super reasonable. Highly recommend them if you’re thinking about tattoo or microblading removal! 🙌✨
I highly recommend this place! She walked me through the entire process and explained everything in detail about the tattoo removal. She also offered a college discount.

This woman is literally the best. Years ago I got a tattoo removed and she did an amazing job as well as talked me through the process. She also removed a small star behind my ear for free! Fast forward to YEARS later. I text to get my never scheduled and she still had my number saved and asked about how my tattoo was doing, as well as giving my neice a referral discount !!! I highly recommend!!!

The girls who work here are very professional and super friendly! God bless there souls, my appointment was fast and great service. Great place hands down. No scabbing or nothing with my tattoo removal, highly recommend!

I couldn't be happier with my tattoo removal experience (as silly as that sounds)! Celia was so kind, knowledgeable, and professional. Tattoo removal is very painful for me, but she really took the time to ensure I was ready and as comfortable as possible to power through. I've been to a few other tattoo removal places, and I am standing on business with Houston Tattoo Removal Clinic.
10/10 would get a bad tattoo just to come back and get it removed by Houston Tattoo Removal Clinic! 😂

Very caring very professional my appt goes so quickly. I’ve been about four or five times and my tattoo is almost gone. No blisters no scabs just fading tattoo ink. I’m always so impressed on how quick it is and how they keep me updated. They text bk so fast they’re the best!!! Oh and they have snacks!
Very nice people good work

Celia and team are nothing short of amazing. Everyone is so warm and kind, I’m happy to get rid of this tattoo but I will be extremely sad to not see them every couple of months anymore. Prices are super reasonable and I couldn’t have picked a better place for my first tattoo removal experience. Hopefully I won’t have to remove any other tattoos but I would choose them again and again!
Celia - director, Amanda - technician, Aimee - receptionist  gave me the best service in  Houston , my tattoos are gone in 2 sessons.
The tested zap was great, first session they put on lowest setting. Didn't affect tattoo at all, not even faded. Didn't peel or do anything! Go to removery this place is a scam
They have the best lasers for every color, very knowledgable, fair priced, and great customer service.

Realmente este ha sido de los mejores servicios que he recibido en mi vida. La doctora went far and beyond con nosotros. Espectaculares, super profesionales, amables. Super recomendado sin duda alguna.
Thank you so much for your Kindness and the great service your Team is doing for ex-gang members. Keep up the great work!!

The girls who work here are angels and the business is truly set up to help people. Pricing is very fair, they aren’t trying to get as much money out of you as they can, and they are professional, informative, and available by text for any questions or concerns during healing. They even gave me my second session free after it didn’t fade as much as we expected. Highly recommend this place over any other clinic!
So sweet fast and very professional

I love the customers service here and the lady that does the tattoo removal omggggg she amazing explains exactly what she gonna do to you and how the process is gonna be n how is gonna heal how is gonna look like n what not .. the replying to the questions is fast. Im going for my second treatment and if i gotta keep going to get tattoo removal ill completely be coming back here for sure the prices are pretty good to me depending what u removing other then that LOVE YOU GUYS♥️🩵
Courteous and knowledgeable. Pam made me feel comfortable and welcomed.

I’ve visited 2 tattoo removal places prior to this one and I can assure this is one of the best places. I’ve been going here for a year now 4 sessions and my tattoo is nearly gone. The staff is friendly and most of all Celia is just the best of the best. She pays attention to detail when treating your skin, gives all the advice and information you need or you might be concerned about and on top of that she has an amazing personality and speaks 100miles/hour lol. My husband and I highly recommend this place. And a big plus plus reasonable pricing!!
A very positive experience! I was throughly interacted with and educated from the moment I called. Fantastic service and top notch work. Looking forward to my next session 😊🙏🏼
Great job on removing an unwanted tattoo,  very nice and friendly staff

I was really nervous about using anyone for this process. I didn't know if it would ever be in my budget at all. However, these guys made getting my tattoos removed possible.
Celia is awesome, and she really cares about you as a person/client and will make you feel extremely comfortable with the process.
I am more than half way done with some of my removals and started a few others not to long ago, and I have one more large one to get to after thoughs. They've made the whole process very easy and affordable. They stay in contact after-hours and are available by text.
10/10 recommend this place to get your no longer loved marks removed!
Ask for Celia!
Looking forward to my appointment this Saturday for hopefully my last session on my cheek

I cant say enough good things about this place. Extremely patient, customer oriented, priced reasonably and just truly amazing human beings that work here. They treat you like you are a human not just another number here. I would highly recommend everyone to come visit here. Even if you live on the other side of town. Trust me there is no place like Houston Tattoo removal.
Omg!! The experience was so great Celia made me feel right at home!! She gave me great aftercare instructions as well.The front desk was very welcoming as well!!.

I went here today to get a tattoo removed.  Everything about the visit before and durring when perfect.  Nice and knowlegeable people and a great price.   I went to removal first and this place is going to be around half the price with better service.    And they are open Mondays which helps me.  I showed up early and they were able to take me right away.  I was in and out in 15 mins or so.   If you are looking around give them a shot.

I went in for my first session and I was scared as hell! I was quickly put to ease by the cleanliness and amazing staff! My technician didn’t sugar coat anything but was honest and told me EXACTLY what I was going to feel. I loved that no matter how many times I asked her to stop (3times) she did and no matter how many f bombs I dropped she still asked if I was okay! I highly recommend Houston Tattoo Removal Clinic if you need a tattoo removal!
Wonderful service, friendly and great tattoo removal work.
Tattoo removal is not a fast or painless process but these woman make it better. They are upfront and honest with how it will go down.

These people are awesome! They greet you as soon as you walk in. They’re very professional and amazing. The work is very meticulous. If they’re closed they are still attentive to your questions and concerns. I recommend people to come here and get your laser removal done comfortably and in a friendly environment! You two are GREAT!

I recently went for my 2nd session, and I’m pleased to say that this tattoo removal clinic is the best of the best, staff is great, clinic is clean, very informative, and they will treat you amazing through the entire process, thus far I’m seeing amazing results.

Great place to erase the mistakes made in life.
Very cozy.
The staff are wonderful.
Very well priced.
I have looked all over Houston and this is the best.
They work with you.
501 c friendly also.
Ask your church to help.
Very polite and still going to them
Nice people and clean clinic,  fast and friendly
